offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, manual conversion causes delays in project timelines. We simplify document conversion instead of manual document conversion.
problem: Manual conversion of project plans to permit applications is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors

Community forums for construction contractors sharing tools
try_it: Let users try basic template selection and preview before submission
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
